label: Order Book
description: Live bid/ask ladder with depth bars, spread display, and price level aggregation for the active instrument.

l0.notes: 0.1 PASS — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 PASS — requiredEntitlements: ['execution-basic','execution-full']. 0.3 PASS — availableOn: ['terminal']. 0.4 PASS — zero any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 PASS — no lib/mocks imports. 0.6 BLOCKED — TerminalData context exposes no isLoading field; widget renders empty-state guard immediately with no spinner. 0.7 PASS — guards on bids.length === 0 && asks.length === 0 renders 'No order book data' message. 0.8 BLOCKED — TerminalData context exposes no error field; requires context extension. 0.9 PASS — no dead code or commented-out blocks. Widget was previously audited in BP-2 §8.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — data exclusively via useTerminalData(); bids/asks/livePrice/spread/spreadBps all from context. 1.2 PASS — context reads useGlobalScope() in use-terminal-page-data.ts; orderbookApiData sourced from useOrderBook() which passes mode/asOf params from scope. 1.3 N/A — order book is instrument-level L2 market data; no org/client filtering applies. 1.4 N/A — same reason. 1.5 N/A — strategy filter does not affect the order book. 1.6 N/A — empty scope shows full market order book (correct for market data). 1.7 PASS — no reference data in this widget; order book mock generation in lib/mocks/generators/order-book.ts (correct location, used by context not widget).

knownIssues.description: No loading skeleton. TerminalData context has no isLoading field so the widget cannot distinguish 'loading' from 'empty'. Currently both states show 'No order book data' which is misleading during initial fetch.
knownIssues.blockedBy: TerminalData context missing isLoading field — requires context extension

knownIssues.description: No error state. TerminalData context has no error field; orderbookApiData errors are silently swallowed and the widget falls back to mock data rather than showing an error.
knownIssues.blockedBy: TerminalData context missing error field — requires context extension

findings: Widget is minimal and clean — correctly delegates all rendering to the shared OrderBook component.
Empty state guard (bids.length === 0 && asks.length === 0) is correct for 0.7.

L0 0.6 and 0.8 are context-blocked. In practice, generateMockOrderBook fallback in use-terminal-page-data.ts means bids/asks are never truly empty — loading and empty states are virtually indistinguishable at the widget level. Context should expose isLoading to differentiate.
In mock data mode the context always returns non-empty bids/asks so the empty guard never fires; useful only when real API returns nothing.
